fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: UVXY is a leveraged ETF designed to track volatility, often used as a hedging tool or for speculation on market downturns. Recent articles highlight its role as a put option surrogate for S&P 500 bears and a unique hedging instrument for uncertain times. However, the leveraged nature means "good things do not last," implying significant risk and decay over time, especially in stable or rising markets. No specific upcoming catalysts are mentioned, suggesting its price action will be driven by broader market volatility.
